description.ko: 식물적 생명과 천상의 유체 역학이 결합된 우주적 호흡 기관을 매크로 시점으로 탐구한 작품입니다.
description.en: A macro exploration of a cosmic respiratory organelle that merges botanical life with celestial fluid dynamics.

prompt: An ultra-detailed cinematic 3D render of AURA-7, titled 'The Celestial Alveoli.' A sprawling, rhythmic architecture of translucent #7FB069 emerald moss membranes and deep #2D5A3D vascular vines, suspended in a weightless #E6F2E1 pearlescent liquid void. The entity functions as a cosmic lung, inhaling #FFE66D golden bioluminescent gas that swirls like liquid silk. Macro focus on the semi-permeable textures and pulsating internal sap channels. Rendered in Octane with hyper-realistic fluid dynamics, 8k resolution, volumetric light shafts, and extreme soft focus bokeh to capture a divine organic flow.
